mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT BIZ_CD AS bizCd ,BIZ_CD_NM AS bizCdNm ,BIZ_CD_DESC AS bizCdDesc ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBBIZCD WHERE 1=1
AND BIZ_CD like CONCAT('%',#{bizCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BIZ_CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{bizCdNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BIZ_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{bizCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by BIZ_CD ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r where p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) and p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBBIZCD WHERE 1=1
AND BIZ_CD like CONCAT('%',#{bizCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BIZ_CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{bizCdNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND BIZ_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{bizCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
SELECT BIZ_CD AS bizCd ,BIZ_CD_NM AS bizCdNm ,BIZ_CD_DESC AS bizCdDesc FROM TBBIZCD WHERE BIZ_CD = #{bizCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBBIZCD WHERE BIZ_CD = #{bizCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
